sections.paragraph:
Original: נשׁל

Transliteration: nâshal

Phonetic: naw-shal'

BDB Definition:

  1. to slip off, drop off, clear away, draw off
    1. (Qal)
      1. to slip or drop off
      2. to draw off
      3. to clear away
    2. (Piel) to clear out completely, clear entirely

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1432

Part(s) of speech: Verb
